title: syngramma borneensis
intro: Syngramma borneensis, a species of fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, the Syngramma borneensis plant has been used in herbal medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, Syngramma borneensis can be used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to enhance its medicinal effects.
